expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgenмңјлЎң short-id мғқм„ұ л°Ҹ state directory мғқм„ұ
Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.jsonмқҳ dimensions.failure_typeмқҙ data_loss кҙҖл Ё к°’ нҸ¬н•Ё
expectations.evidence: dimensions.failure_type='data_loss' (underscore format per JSON schema enum). Trace explicitly notes: 'failure_type: data_loss -- financial data integrity is compromised; stored amounts don't match source-of-truth'

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspective-generatorк°Җ seed-analysis.jsonмқҳ payment/data кҙҖл Ё findingsлҘј мқҪкі  financial archetype л§Өн•‘
expectations.evidence: Matched mapping row: 'Payment discrepancy, billing error, revenue data mismatch -> financial + data-integrity + root-cause'. domain=data, failure_type=data_loss evaluated.
perspectives.json contains perspective with id='financial', name='Financial & Compliance'

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: financial perspectiveмқҳ modelмқҙ opus, agent_typeмқҙ architect (archetype table мқјм№ҳ)
expectations.evidence: Financial perspective: model='opus', agent_type='architect'. Trace confirms: 'Financial: opus/architect (per archetype table)' and notes the archetype reference table row.

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.jsonм—җ rules_appliedмҷҖ complexity_scaling_correct н•„л“ң мЎҙмһ¬
expectations.evidence: rules_applied contains complexity_scaling_correct:true (multi-factor->3-5, selected 4), domain_archetype_match_enforced:true, and all other mandatory rule fields

expectations.text: Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestionмңјлЎң perspective мҠ№мқё мҡ”мІӯ нӣ„ perspectives.jsonм—җ approved=true м¶”к°Җ
expectations.evidence: AskUserQuestion shown with 4 perspectives listed and rules applied summary. User selects 'Proceed'. perspectives.json updated with approved:true, user_modifications:[]

expectations.text: Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping мӢӨн–ү (prism_docs_roots нҳём¶ң мӢңлҸ„)
expectations.evidence: ToolSearch(query='select:mcp__prism-mcp__prism_docs_roots') followed by mcp__prism-mcp__prism_docs_roots() call. User selects grafana, sentry, mcp-clickhouse.

expectations.text: Phase 0.8: context.jsonм—җ research_summaryк°Җ seed-analysis.jsonмқҳ research лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј л°ҳмҳҒ
expectations.evidence: context.json research_summary.key_findings maps from seed-analysis.json findings. report_language='ko', investigation_loops=0 both present.

expectations.text: Phase 1: financial-analystк°Җ extended-archetypes.mdмқҳ Financial Lens м„№м…ҳ + finding-protocol.mdлЎң spawn
expectations.evidence: financial-analyst reads 'extended-archetypes.md -- section Financial Lens' + finding-protocol.md. Spawned as opus/architect. {KEY_QUESTIONS} injected with 4 financial-specific questions.

expectations.text: Phase 1: к°Ғ analystк°Җ perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.jsonм—җ analyst, findings[] н•„л“ң мһ‘м„ұ
expectations.evidence: financial/findings.json shown with analyst:'financial' and findings[]. All 4 analysts write to their respective paths.

expectations.text: Phase 2A: finding л¶„м„қк°Җ shutdown нӣ„ TaskOutputмңјлЎң drain
expectations.evidence: Step 2A.3 shows shutdown_request to all 4 analysts. Each responds with shutdown_response(approve=true). TaskOutput drain follows.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: verifierк°Җ findings.jsonмқ„ мқҪмқҖ нӣ„ prism_interview мӢӨн–ү
expectations.evidence: All 4 verifiers read findings.json and call prism_interview. {summary} replaced from context.json.summary. {perspective-id} replaced in paths, interview calls, and SendMessage. Trace explicitly documents both replacements.

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.mdм—җ лӘЁл“  perspectiveмқҳ кІҖмҰқ кІ°кіј нҶөн•©
expectations.evidence: Step 2B.6 writes analyst-findings.md with Verification Scores Summary (financial:8.5, data-integrity:7.8, root-cause:9.1, timeline:8.2) and all verified findings

expectations.text: Phase 3: report.md н…ңн”ҢлҰҝмқҳ лӘЁл“  м„№м…ҳмқҙ analyst-findings.md кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң мұ„мӣҢм§җ
expectations.evidence: Full report in Korean per report_language='ko'. Contains all template sections: Executive Summary, Analysis Overview, Timeline, Perspective Findings (all 4), Integrated Analysis, Socratic Verification Summary, Recommendations, Prevention Checklist.
